[Rerun Pick-Up Recruitment Preview]

A Rerun Pick-Up Recruitment will begin on 10/10 (Tue)!
Pick-Up Student: 3★ Izuna, 2★ Shizuko

Pick-Up Recruitment Schedule: 10/10 (Tue) 2:00 AM – 10/17 (Tue) 1:59 AM (UTC)
